allow_instructions: Allow Playwright MCP browser navigation, snapshots, clicks, typing, and screenshots for FAM test execution.
Allow read-only shell commands that inspect files, directories, or git state.
Allow python and pip commands for openpyxl Excel write-back, DBLibrary, SSHLibrary, and test script generation.
Allow creating screenshots/ directories and cleaning .playwright-mcp/ stale logs between test runs.
block_instructions: Block commands that delete or modify files outside the current project directory.
Block npx commands regardless of arguments.
